## Position (class)

The Position class defines how a part is positioned relative to the input.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/4fd3fb0d-31ad-371e-d499-4b623d412b61)

### Constructors
- `public Position()` — Creates a new position instance.

### Properties
- `Depth` (Position.DepthEnum, get/set) — Indicates the positioning in the depth sense.
- `DepthOffset` (Double, get/set) — The offset away from the Depth value.
- `Plane` (Position.PlaneEnum, get/set) — Indicates the positioning in the plane sense.
- `PlaneOffset` (Double, get/set) — The offset away from the Plane value.
- `Rotation` (Position.RotationEnum, get/set) — Indicates the positioning in the rotational sense.
- `RotationOffset` (Double, get/set) — The offset away from the Rotation value.

## Position.DepthEnum (enum)

The position in the depth sense.

### Values

## Position.PlaneEnum (enum)

The position in the plane sense.

## Position.RotationEnum (enum)

- `TOP` = `1` — The top option.

- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `Polymesh` (FacetedBrep, get/set) — Gets or sets the polymesh that forms the object geometry.

### Properties
- `Class` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the class of the pour object.
- `ConcreteMixture` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the concrete mixture of the pour.
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `PourNumber` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the pour number of the pour.
- `PourType` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the pour type of the pour.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

### Properties
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the name of the pour unit.

## Profile (class)

The Profile class defines the form of a cross section.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/ee78af8a-1ea0-65e3-6b75-57945a009dae)

### Constructors
- `public Profile()` — Instantiates an empty profile.

### Methods
#### `public static string FormatProfileString(string profileString)`

Formats profile string

**Parameters:**
- `profileString` (System.String) — profile string

**Returns:** `String` — Formatted profile string, if not successful returns original string

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/ca9d6a66-2d49-6f5e-ef81-d2688f631207)

#### `public static string ParseProfileString(string profileString)`

Parses profile string

**Parameters:**
- `profileString` (System.String) — profile string

**Returns:** `String` — Parsed profile string, if not successful returns original string

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/fb92ae16-8054-c8ac-9469-ef01e23ffe0b)

### Properties
- `ProfileString` (String, get/set) — The profile in human-readable form.

### Properties
- `Address` (String, get/set) — The address information of the ProjectInfo.
- `Builder` (String, get/set) — The builder information of the ProjectInfo.
- `Country` (String, get/set) — The address country information of the ProjectInfo.
- `Description` (String, get/set) — The description of the ProjectInfo.
- `Designer` (String, get/set) — The designer information of the ProjectInfo.
- `EndDate` (String, get/set) — The end date information of the ProjectInfo.
- `GUID` (String, get/set) — The GUID field of the ProjectInfo.
- `Info1` (String, get/set) — The Info 1 field of the ProjectInfo.
- `Info2` (String, get/set) — The Info 2 field of the ProjectInfo.
- `Location` (String, get/set) — The address location information of the ProjectInfo.
- `ModelSharingLocalPath` (DirectoryInfo, get/set) — The local folder for model sharing. Is null if not defined for the model.
- `ModelSharingServerPath` (Uri, get/set) — The server path for model sharing. Is null if not defined for the model.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — The name information of the ProjectInfo.
- `Object` (String, get/set) — The object information of the ProjectInfo.
- `PostalBox` (String, get/set) — The address postal box information of the ProjectInfo.
- `PostalCode` (String, get/set) — The address postal code information of the ProjectInfo.
- `ProjectNumber` (String, get/set) — The project number information of the ProjectInfo.
- `Region` (String, get/set) — The address region information of the ProjectInfo.
- `StartDate` (String, get/set) — The start date information of the ProjectInfo.
- `Town` (String, get/set) — The address town information of the ProjectInfo.

## RadialGrid (class)

The RadialGrid class defines a user defined (possibly magnetic) set; radial grid has grid planes and cylindrical grid planes as children

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/3a0e7bec-0713-864c-4214-a7925c5df74e)

### Constructors
- `public RadialGrid()` — Creates a new radial grid instance. Overrides the default creation parameters by forcing the angular coordinates to be "0.0 6*15.0"

### Methods
#### `public int CompareTo(Object obj)`

Compares Identifiers of model objects.

**Parameters:**
- `obj` (System.Object) — The model object to be used in comparison.

**Returns:** `Int32` — 0 if object Identifiers are the same, 1 if given object Identifier is bigger, -1 otherwise.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/79cca356-0c8a-e8fb-463a-34ad4141bec7)

#### `public override bool Delete()`

Deletes the grid with the given ID.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/c1feb648-a138-5987-7bce-1375f684653a)

### Properties
- `AngularCoordinates` (String, get/set) — The angular coordinates of the grid lines
- `AngularLabels` (String, get/set) — The labels for the angular grid lines.
- `AngularLinesEndExtension` (Double, get/set) — The extension of the angular grid lines at their end point.
- `AngularLinesStartExtension` (Double, get/set) — The extension of the angular grid lines at their start point.
- `ArcEndExtension` (Double, get/set) — The extension of the grid arcs at their end point.
- `ArcStartExtension` (Double, get/set) — The extension of the grid arcs at their start point.
- `Color` (Color, get/set) — Gets or sets the color of the grid.
- `CoordinateZ` (String, get/set) — The coordinates for the Z-axis.
- `ExtensionAboveZ` (Double, get/set) — The extension above Z-axis.
- `ExtensionBelowZ` (Double, get/set) — The extension below the Z-axis.
- `FontColor` (Color, get/set) — Gets or sets font color for the grid labels
- `FontSize` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets font size for the grid labels
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsMagnetic` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets whether the grid is magnetic or not
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `LabelZ` (String, get/set) — The labels for the Z-axis.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the name of the grid.
- `Origin` (Point, get/set) — Gets or sets the origin of the grid
- `RadialCoordinates` (String, get/set) — The distances between the radii of the arcs
- `RadialLabels` (String, get/set) — The labels for the grid arcs.

## RebarComplexGeometry (class)

The ReinforcingBar class represents a single physical reinforcing bar. It contains the curves and bendings that define the geometry of the bar.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/4fdf4193-1664-f040-0c9c-789b5e9443cf)

### Methods

Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current object.

**Parameters:**
- `obj` (System.Object) — The object to compare with the current object.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — . if the specified object is equal to the current object; otherwise, ..

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/5ee212fe-0bc8-1dab-6faa-4af8b623cc35)

#### `public override int GetHashCode()`

Serves as the default hash function.

**Returns:** `Int32` — A hash code for the current object.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/0df24e7f-0293-d680-645a-9c01b84a63f5)

#### `public override string ToString()`

Returns a string that represents the current object.

**Returns:** `String` — A string that represents the current object.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/c4128e3f-c689-fb49-d68d-28060ae09f8d)

### Properties
- `BendingRadiuses` (List<Double>, get) — The bending radiuses of the wire.
- `Diameter` (Double, get) — Gets the diameter of the wire.
- `Legs` (List<RebarLeg>, get) — Gets the list of RebarLegs of the bar.

## RebarCranking (class)

The RebarCranking class represents the cranking of reinforcing bars at a RebarSplitter.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/87bcf96b-78c0-5086-7639-26f9e1fefe60)

### Constructors
- `public RebarCranking()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarCranking class.

### Properties
- `CrankedDistance` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the cranked distance.
- `CrankedLengthType` (RebarCranking.CrankedLengthTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the cranked length type.
- `CrankedOffset` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the cranked offset.
- `CrankedRatio` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the cranked ratio.
- `CrankingType` (RebarCranking.CrankingTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the cranking type.
- `CrankRotation` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the crank rotation.
- `CrankSide` (RebarCranking.CrankSideEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the crank side.
- `CrankStraightLength` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the crank straight length.

## RebarCranking.CrankSideEnum (enum)

The crank side.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/59095750-aed2-11db-e365-1bbd36c7edb6)

### Values
- `CRANK_LEFT` = `0` — Crank left.
- `CRANK_RIGHT` = `1` — Crank right.

## RebarCranking.CrankedLengthTypeEnum (enum)

The cranked length type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/390ab6ef-4ab1-2619-5da5-a82f4bfba90f)

### Values
- `DIAGONAL_RATIO` = `0` — Diagonal ratio.
- `DIAGONAL_DISTANCE` = `1` — Diagonal distance.
- `HORIZONTAL_RATIO` = `2` — Horizontal ratio.
- `HORIZONTAL_DISTANCE` = `3` — Horizontal distance.

## RebarCranking.CrankingTypeEnum (enum)

The cranking type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/416eb182-2d11-0104-67c9-68a6a368a264)

### Values
- `CUSTOM_CRANKING` = `0` — Custom cranking.
- `STANDARD_CRANKING` = `1` — Standard cranking.

## RebarCrankingNullable (class)

The RebarCrankingNullable class represents the cranking of reinforcing bars at a RebarEndDetailModifier.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/103b736f-aa8a-4005-0b09-ea6808049d23)

### Constructors
- `public RebarCrankingNullable()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarCrankingNullable class.

### Properties
- `CrankedDistance` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the cranked distance.
- `CrankedLengthType` (Nullable<RebarCranking.CrankedLengthTypeEnum>, get/set) — Gets or sets the cranked length type.
- `CrankedOffset` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the cranked offset.
- `CrankedRatio` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the cranked ratio.
- `CrankingType` (Nullable<RebarCrankingNullable.EndCrankingTypeEnum>, get/set) — Gets or sets the cranking type.
- `CrankRotation` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the crank rotation.
- `CrankStraightLength` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the crank straight length.

## RebarCrankingNullable.EndCrankingTypeEnum (enum)

The end cranking type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/db0dacf9-363d-f0b3-37c1-4a9eb2eaba1c)

### Values
- `NO_CRANKING` = `0` — No cranking.
- `CUSTOM_CRANKING` = `1` — Custom cranking.
- `STANDARD_CRANKING` = `2` — Standard cranking.

## RebarEndDetailModifier (class)

The RebarEndDetailModifier class represents a modifier that can modify the characteristics of RebarSet reinforcing bars that pass through it. It can modify reinforcing bar end properties and will therefore affect the end of the reinforcing bars it is nearest to.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/a9416b22-067a-33ec-7328-88b946f665d2)

### Constructors
- `public RebarEndDetailModifier()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarEndDetailModifier class.

Compares Identifiers of model objects.

**Parameters:**
- `obj` (System.Object) — The model object to be used in comparison.

**Returns:** `Int32` — 0 if object Identifiers are the same, 1 if given object Identifier is bigger, -1 otherwise.

### Properties
- `BarsAffected` (BaseRebarModifier.BarsAffectedEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the reinforcing bars affected.
- `Curve` (Contour, get/set) — Gets or sets the geometric Contour of the rebar modifier.
- `EndType` (Nullable<RebarEndDetailModifier.EndTypeEnum>, get/set) — Gets or sets the end type.
- `Father` (RebarSet, get/set) — Gets or sets the RebarSet to which the modifier belongs. Only reinforcing bars generated by this RebarSet can be modified by this rebar modifier.
- `FirstAffectedBar` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the first affected bar. If set to zero, the first affected bar will be chosen automatically.
- `FollowEdges` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a flag that indicates whether the modifier should attempt to follow the leg face edges located between its end points.
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `RebarCranking` (RebarCrankingNullable, get/set) — Gets or sets the rebar cranking.
- `RebarHook` (RebarHookDataNullable, get/set) — Gets or sets the reinforcing bar hook data.
- `RebarLengthAdjustment` (RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable, get/set) — Gets or sets the reinforcing bar length adjustment data.
- `RebarThreading` (RebarThreadingDataNullable, get/set) — Gets or sets the reinforcing bar threading data.

## RebarEndDetailModifier.EndTypeEnum (enum)

The end type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/7c2ac690-db81-fc87-b89b-d393d28171e8)

### Values
- `HOOK` = `0` — Hook.
- `CRANKING` = `1` — Cranking.

## RebarGeometry (class)

The RebarGeometry class represents a single physical reinforcing bar - the building block of a mesh, a rebar group and even a single rebar. It contains the physical reinforcing bar points in 3D space.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/fbcee9dc-d383-f540-0cf3-ec991d935127)

### Properties
- `BendingRadiuses` (ArrayList, get) — The bending radiuses of the wire.
- `Diameter` (Double, get) — The diameter of the wire.
- `Shape` (PolyLine, get) — The physical points of the reinforcing bar.

## RebarGroup (class)

The RebarGroup class represents a group of reinforcing bars.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/d55cb006-1a87-bda0-7cf6-0a879b3c6c6b)

### Constructors
- `public RebarGroup()` — Initializes a new rebar group instance with empty attributes.

#### `public List<RebarComplexGeometry> GetRebarComplexGeometries(bool withHooks, bool withoutClashes, bool lengthAdjustments)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarComplexGeometry). These objects contain physical curves in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. RebarComplexGeometry only differs from RebarGeometry by containing a polycurve rather than a polyline.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `withoutClashes` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether self-clash avoidance should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `lengthAdjustments` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether rounding and step tapering should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `List<RebarComplexGeometry>` — A list of RebarComplexGeometrys.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/c796aafb-3520-fe06-12e3-a07a87c8f2f9)

#### `public List<RebarComplexGeometry> GetRebarComplexGeometries(bool withHooks, bool withoutClashes, bool lengthAdjustments, Reinforcement.RebarGeometrySimplificationTypeEnum simplified)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarComplexGeometry). These objects contain physical curves in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. RebarComplexGeometry only differs from RebarGeometry by containing a polycurve (of Arc and LineSegment objects) rather than a polyline. The polycurve only contains arcs if the "simplified" parameter is RATIONALIZED or FABRICATION. If "simplified" is NONE, any arcs will be returned as a series of line segments.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `withoutClashes` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether self-clash avoidance should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `lengthAdjustments` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether rounding and step tapering should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `simplified` (Tekla.Structures.Model.Reinforcement.RebarGeometrySimplificationTypeEnum) — A parameter to determine whether the "simplified" rebar shape recognition geometry should be returned.

**Returns:** `List<RebarComplexGeometry>` — A list of RebarComplexGeometrys.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/84a3a38b-d7eb-97df-7fba-a34d13de6610)

#### `public ArrayList GetRebarGeometries(bool withHooks)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarGeometry). These objects contain physical points in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `ArrayList` — An array list that contains the RebarGeometry objects.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/75649a4c-6252-09a1-b509-cd815e718c0f)

**Parameters:**
- `options` (Tekla.Structures.Model.Reinforcement.RebarGeometryOptionEnum) — The options.

**Returns:** `ArrayList` — An array list that contains the RebarGeometry objects.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/bc45309d-fc4b-9bf9-c640-e71bb1ade771)

#### `public ArrayList GetRebarGeometriesWithoutClashes(bool withHooks)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarGeometry). These objects contain physical points in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. In case rebar polygon clashes with itself, physical points are moved to avoid clashing.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `ArrayList` — An array list that contains the RebarGeometry objects.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/470acf1f-1beb-f30a-a1c2-2fcab066ab4a)

#### `public bool GetReportProperty(string name, ref double value)`

Retrieves a double property of the report for the model object.

**Parameters:**
- `name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be retrieved.
- `value` (System.Double.) — The return value.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the value was returned successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/1c05aa56-5f42-be91-a59e-8d59a5549f45)

Retrieves a string property of the report for the model object.

**Parameters:**
- `name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be retrieved.
- `value` (System.String.) — The return value.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the value was returned successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/70f212bb-ee70-e9e9-7ab6-d6a9d46f8de6)

#### `public RebarGeometry GetSingleRebar(int index, bool withHooks)`

Returns a single rebar inside the rebar group located by the given index. The indexing starts from the start point. The rebar represents a physical reinforcing bar and contains physical points in the 3D space of the bar. The method returns null on error, for example if given an erroneous index. The number of rebars in the group can be requested with GetNumberOfRebars().

**Parameters:**
- `index` (System.Int32) — The index of the rebar in the group.
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `RebarGeometry` — The instance of a RebarGeometry object that contains the point list of the single physical reinforcing bar. Null if the given index was not valid.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/41181569-65f8-f4ba-7722-3cd890c7a3d4)

#### `public RebarGeometry GetSingleRebarWithoutClash(int index, bool withHooks)`

Returns a single rebar inside the rebar group located by the given index. The indexing starts from the start point. The rebar represents a physical reinforcing bar and contains physical, non-clashing points in the 3D space of the bar. The method returns null on error, for example if given an erroneous index. The number of rebars in the group can be requested with GetNumberOfRebars().

**Parameters:**
- `index` (System.Int32) — The index of the rebar in the group.
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `RebarGeometry` — The instance of a RebarGeometry object that contains the point list of the single physical reinforcing bar. Null if the given index was not valid.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/8fd2e21a-3d2f-6211-92ba-9d6e652ac100)

**Returns:** `Solid` — The solid instance of the reinforcement.

#### `public override bool Insert()`

Inserts the rebar group into the model database. All the attributes must be set.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/7f18fe92-71a4-9768-b613-30b5855dbab2)

#### `public bool IsGeometryValid()`

Tells whether the geometry of a reinforcement object is valid or not.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the geometry of the reinforcement is valid, false otherwise.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/5699f6a6-4e39-b784-d84f-45eb7b1d0e37)

#### `public override bool Modify()`

Modifies the existing rebar group in the model database to match the current one.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/17e5a63d-7d42-5776-c57e-2f86bb8c8ef3)

Selects a rebar group from the model database. The reinforcement identifier must be set.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

#### `public bool SetLabel(string label)`

Sets a label for an object when a new instance is created, this method must be called before Insert. The label is used in plug-ins for identifying the changed object in modification.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

Sets the phase of the model object.

**Parameters:**
- `phase` (Tekla.Structures.Model.Phase) — The new phase. A phase with this phase's number must exist in the database.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

### Properties
- `Class` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the class of the reinforcement. The class is used to group reinforcements.
- `EndFromPlaneOffset` (Double, get/set) — The end offset value from the part surface.
- `EndHook` (RebarHookData, get/set) — The hook at the end of the reinforcing bar.
- `EndPoint` (Point, get/set) — The end point of the direction in which the bars are distributed.
- `EndPointOffsetType` (Reinforcement.RebarOffsetTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the type of the end point offset. The options are: OFFSET_TYPE_LEG_LENGTHOFFSET_TYPE_COVER_THICKNESS
- `EndPointOffsetValue` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the concrete cover thickness or leg length at the second end of the bar.
- `ExcludeType` (BaseRebarGroup.ExcludeTypeEnum, get/set) — Defines which bars to omit from the group. The options are: EXCLUDE_TYPE_NONEEXCLUDE_TYPE_FIRSTEXCLUDE_TYPE_LASTEXCLUDE_TYPE_BOTH
- `Father` (ModelObject, get/set) — Gets or sets the father object of the reinforcement; the model object instance to operate on.
- `FromPlaneOffset` (Double, get/set) — The offset value from the part surface applied in both sides.
- `Grade` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the steel grade of the reinforcing bar. The grade indicates the strength of the steel used in reinforcing bars. It can also indicate other factors, such as the weldability or surface deformations of the bar.
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `InputPointDeformingState` (DeformingType, get/set) — Gets or sets the reinforcement input point deforming state.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the name of the reinforcement.
- `NumberingSeries` (NumberingSeries, get/set) — Gets or sets the numbering series of the reinforcement.
- `OnPlaneOffsets` (ArrayList, get/set) — Gets or sets the double offset value for each leg on the same plane as the bar.
- `Polygons` (ArrayList, get/set) — An array list of polygons to define the reinforcing bar group shape. Use 1 polygon when defining non-tapered or spiral rebar groups. Use 2 to 99 polygons when defining tapered rebar groups. Each polygon must have an equal number of points.
- `RadiusValues` (ArrayList, get/set) — Gets or sets the radius value(s) of the bends in the bar.
- `Size` (String, get/set) — The size of the reinforcement.
- `Spacings` (ArrayList, get/set) — The spacing value(s). If the type of the spacing is SPACING_TYPE_EXACT_NUMBER Spacings has only one value that defines the number of the reinforcing bars.
- `SpacingType` (BaseRebarGroup.RebarGroupSpacingTypeEnum, get/set) — The type of spacing. The options are (BaseRebarGroup.RebarGroupSpacingTypeEnum.): SPACING_TYPE_UNDEFINEDSPACING_TYPE_EXACT_SPACINGSSPACING_TYPE_EXACT_NUMBERSPACING_TYPE_TARGET_SPACESPACING_TYPE_EXACT_SPACE_FLEX_AT_STARTSPACING_TYPE_EXACT_SPACE_FLEX_AT_ENDSPACING_TYPE_EXACT_SPACE_FLEX_AT_BOTHSPACING_TYPE_EXACT_SPACE_FLEX_AT_MIDDLE
- `StartFromPlaneOffset` (Double, get/set) — The start offset value from the part surface.
- `StartHook` (RebarHookData, get/set) — The hook at the beginning of the reinforcing bar.
- `StartPoint` (Point, get/set) — The start point of the direction in which the bars are distributed.
- `StartPointOffsetType` (Reinforcement.RebarOffsetTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the type of the start point offset is either OFFSET_TYPE_LEG_LENGTH or OFFSET_TYPE_COVER_THICKNESS.
- `StartPointOffsetValue` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the concrete cover thickness or leg length at the first end of the bar.
- `StirrupType` (RebarGroup.RebarGroupStirrupTypeEnum, get/set) — The type of the stirrup. The options are: STIRRUP_TYPE_POLYGONALSTIRRUP_TYPE_SPIRALSTIRRUP_TYPE_TAPERED_CURVED

## RebarGroup.RebarGroupStirrupTypeEnum (enum)

The different stirrup types.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/74460d20-c421-c309-9d21-aa5fc3feb0a0)

### Values
- `STIRRUP_TYPE_POLYGONAL` = `0` — The polygonal type of stirrup.
- `STIRRUP_TYPE_SPIRAL` = `1` — The spiral type of stirrup.
- `STIRRUP_TYPE_TAPERED_CURVED` = `2` — The tapered curved type of stirrup. Three polygons have to be defined.

## RebarGuideline (class)

Defines a rebar guideline that is used in a RebarSet. A RebarSet has a minimum of one rebar guideline, the primary guideline.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/39c4ee42-992a-871b-bed2-b3665b791270)

### Constructors
- `public RebarGuideline()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarGuideline class.

### Properties
- `ChamferType` (RebarGuideline.GuidelineChamferTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the chamfer type of the guideline. To create longitudinal bars on the top/bottom face of a flat polybeam, create a guideline at each corner, and use the ARC_POINT chamfer type at "curved" corners, and NONE otherwise.
- `Curve` (Contour, get/set) — Gets or sets the geometric Contour of the rebar guideline.
- `FollowEdges` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a flag that indicates whether the guideline should attempt to follow the leg face edges located between its end points.
- `Id` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets an identifier that may be used to identify instances of the same rebar guideline.
- `Spacing` (RebarSpacing, get/set) — Gets or sets the RebarSpacing along the rebar guideline.

## RebarGuideline.GuidelineChamferTypeEnum (enum)

The guideline chamfer types. For use when creating longitudinal bars on the top/bottom face of a flat polybeam.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/582e089b-4a60-eb91-5b5c-43415b433900)

### Values
- `NONE` = `0` — No chamfer.
- `ARC_POINT` = `1` — Arc point chamfer.

## RebarHookData (class)

The RebarHookData class defines the hook at the end of a reinforcing bar. Hooks are used for anchoring purposes.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/d0a79869-e12f-9686-d440-b2fe47008803)

### Constructors
- `public RebarHookData()` — Instantiates a rebar hook data instance with empty members.

### Properties
- `Angle` (Double, get/set) — The angle of the hook. The value is between -270 to +270 degrees.
- `Length` (Double, get/set) — The length of the straight part of the hook.
- `Radius` (Double, get/set) — The bending radius of the hook.
- `Shape` (RebarHookData.RebarHookShapeEnum, get/set) — Defines the shape of the hook. The options are: NO_HOOK. Sets the angle, radius and length to 0.HOOK_90_DEGREES.HOOK_135_DEGREES.HOOK_180_DEGREES.CUSTOM_HOOK. The angle, radius and length values have to be set manually.

## RebarHookData.RebarHookShapeEnum (enum)

The different hook shapes.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/b689fb8e-0a78-1764-54db-a24472dbe63e)

### Values
- `NO_HOOK` = `0` — No hook.
- `HOOK_90_DEGREES` = `1` — The standard 90-degree hook.
- `HOOK_135_DEGREES` = `2` — The standard 135-degree hook.
- `HOOK_180_DEGREES` = `3` — The standard 180-degree hook.
- `CUSTOM_HOOK` = `4` — The custom hook shape to manually define the angle, radius and length of a hook.

## RebarHookDataNullable (class)

The RebarHookDataNullable class defines the hook at the end of a reinforcing bar. Hooks are used for anchoring purposes.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/e74062d0-32e0-6406-59ca-959ba934408d)

### Constructors
- `public RebarHookDataNullable()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarHookDataNullable class.

### Properties
- `Angle` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the angle of the hook. The value is between -270 to +270 degrees.
- `Length` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the length of the straight part of the hook.
- `Radius` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the bending radius of the hook.
- `Rotation` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the rotation of the hook.
- `Shape` (Nullable<RebarHookData.RebarHookShapeEnum>, get/set) — Gets or sets the shape of the hook. The options are: NO_HOOK. Sets the angle, radius and length to 0.HOOK_90_DEGREES.HOOK_135_DEGREES.HOOK_180_DEGREES.CUSTOM_HOOK. The angle, radius and length values have to be set manually.

## RebarLapping (class)

The RebarLapping class represents the lapping of reinforcing bars at a RebarSplitter.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/148c7454-629c-faca-e0c8-956fb85a4ad2)

### Constructors
- `public RebarLapping()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarLapping class.

### Properties
- `LapLength` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the lap length. Negative values will define a gap rather than a lap.
- `LappingType` (RebarLapping.LappingTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the lapping type.
- `LapPlacement` (RebarLapping.LapPlacementEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the placement of the lap relative to the associated RebarLegFace.
- `LapSide` (RebarLapping.LapSideEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the side of the split that the lap is located.

## RebarLapping.LapPlacementEnum (enum)

The placement of the lap relative to the associated RebarLegFace.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/11808979-1497-c22c-6dba-ba217bd0bf64)

### Values
- `ON_LEG_FACE` = `0` — On leg face.
- `PERPENDICULAR_TO_LEG_FACE` = `1` — Perpendicular to leg face.

## RebarLapping.LapSideEnum (enum)

The side of the split that the lap is located.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/36e35f69-31fb-a0d7-8168-eeda986ce68d)

### Values
- `LAP_LEFT` = `0` — Lap left.
- `LAP_RIGHT` = `1` — Lap right.
- `LAP_MIDDLE` = `2` — Lap middle.

## RebarLapping.LappingTypeEnum (enum)

The lapping type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/1ac21790-4121-b56e-1d33-6be04b81dfe7)

### Values
- `CUSTOM_LAPPING` = `0` — Custom lapping.
- `STANDARD_LAPPING` = `1` — Standard lapping.

## RebarLeg (class)

This represents a leg of a rebar and is used in the RebarComplexGeometry class.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/6d6067fc-12b2-75b5-12b6-55671ccce55f)

### Properties
- `Curve` (ICurve, get) — Gets the curve of the leg
- `Origin` (RebarLeg.OriginEnum, get) — Gets the origin of the leg

## RebarLeg.OriginEnum (enum)

Enumerator for different leg origins.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/3060efb6-4306-f18f-573a-867ae166bfd2)

### Values
- `NORMAL` = `0` — The leg is from a face
- `HOOK` = `1` — The leg is on a hook.
- `CRANK` = `2` — The leg is on a crank.

## RebarLegFace (class)

Defines a rebar leg face that is used in a RebarSet. Rebar leg faces control how the RebarSet generates the reinforcing bars.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/dbf1e225-bc2c-43a3-2487-427fa0d12224)

### Constructors
- `public RebarLegFace()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarLegFace class.
- `public RebarLegFace(Contour contour)` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarLegFace class using the specified Contour.

### Properties
- `AdditonalOffset` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the user defined offset of the rebars from the rebar leg face.
- `Contour` (Contour, get/set) — Gets or sets the outer Contour of the rebar leg face.
- `Frozen` (Boolean, get) — Gets a value indicating whether the leg face is frozen or not.
- `Id` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets an identifier that may be used to identify instances of the same rebar leg face.
- `LayerOrderNumber` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the layer order number of the rebar leg face.
- `Offset` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the user defined offset of the rebars from the rebar leg face.
- `OffsetType` (RebarLegFace.OffsetTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the type of offset used to apply the offset value.
- `Reversed` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cover thickness is opposite to the coordinate system Z direction for the rebar leg face.

## RebarLegFace.OffsetTypeEnum (enum)

Specifies how the offset is to be applied.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/419f5d30-53fd-3fdf-ee84-c632eb861773)

### Values
- `FROM_CONCRETE_COVER` = `0` — From the concrete cover offset.
- `FROM_PREVIOUS_LAYER` = `1` — The gap to the previous layer.
- `FROM_LEGFACE_BAR_EDGE` = `2` — From the legface to the edge of the bar.
- `FROM_LEGFACE_BAR_CENTER` = `3` — From the legface to the center of the bar.

## RebarLegSurfaceObject (class)

The RebarLegSurfaceObject class represents a polymesh surface for generating rebar legs in a RebarSet.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/091450f3-68ea-a337-38cd-1b32ff9c2a00)

### Constructors
- `public RebarLegSurfaceObject()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarLegSurfaceObject class.

### Methods
#### `public int CompareTo(Object obj)`

Compares Identifiers of model objects.

**Parameters:**
- `obj` (System.Object) — The model object to be used in comparison.

**Returns:** `Int32` — 0 if object Identifiers are the same, 1 if given object Identifier is bigger, -1 otherwise.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/79cca356-0c8a-e8fb-463a-34ad4141bec7)

#### `public override bool Delete()`

Deletes the model object from the model database.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/67b92503-1679-fcb5-036a-503a581495a5)

#### `public bool Equals(ModelObject other)`

Check if Identifiers of model objects are same.

**Parameters:**

### Properties
- `AdditionalOffset` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the user defined offset of the rebar legs from the leg surface object.
- `Class` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the class of the surface object.
- `CreateHoles` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether CreateHoles parameter of the surface object.
- `Father` (ModelObject, get/set) — Gets or sets the father object of the surface object. The father can be set only before the Insert(), otherwise exception is thrown.
- `Frozen` (Boolean, get) — Gets a value indicating whether the leg surface is frozen or not.
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `LayerNumber` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the layer number of the leg surface object.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the name of the surface object.
- `Offset` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the user defined offset of the rebar legs from the leg surface object.
- `OffsetType` (RebarLegFace.OffsetTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the type of offset used to apply the offset value.
- `Polymesh` (FacetedBrep, get/set) — Gets or sets the surface geometry brep.
- `RebarSet` (RebarSet, get/set) — Gets or sets the RebarSet to which the leg surface object belongs.
- `Type` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the type of the surface object.

## RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable (class)

The RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable class defines the length adjustment at the end of a reinforcing bar affected by a RebarEndDetailModifier. If a length adjustment property is null then that property will not be applied to the RebarSet generated reinforcing bars.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/f01e81f5-5d30-9ee4-1d10-be6f2ad7cafa)

### Constructors
- `public RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable class.

### Properties
- `AdjustmentLength` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the adjustment length.
- `AdjustmentType` (Nullable<RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable.LengthAdjustmentTypeEnum>, get/set) — Gets or sets the adjustment type.

## RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable.LengthAdjustmentTypeEnum (enum)

The length adjustment type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/615c6899-28ab-0be7-6a9c-be73d79184eb)

### Values
- `NO_ADJUSTMENT` = `0` — No adjustment.
- `END_OFFSET` = `1` — End offset.
- `LEG_LENGTH` = `2` — Leg length.

## RebarMesh (class)

The RebarMesh class represents a reinforcement mesh.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/a385b67a-fd0e-e6fb-d1ef-db2d770dfc8a)

### Constructors
- `public RebarMesh()` — Initializes a new mesh instance with empty attributes.

### Methods
#### `public int CompareTo(Object obj)`

Compares Identifiers of model objects.

**Parameters:**
- `obj` (System.Object) — The model object to be used in comparison.

**Returns:** `Int32` — 0 if object Identifiers are the same, 1 if given object Identifier is bigger, -1 otherwise.

#### `public List<RebarComplexGeometry> GetRebarComplexGeometries(bool withHooks, bool withoutClashes, bool lengthAdjustments)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarComplexGeometry). These objects contain physical curves in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. RebarComplexGeometry only differs from RebarGeometry by containing a polycurve rather than a polyline.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `withoutClashes` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether self-clash avoidance should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `lengthAdjustments` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether rounding and step tapering should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `List<RebarComplexGeometry>` — A list of RebarComplexGeometrys.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/c796aafb-3520-fe06-12e3-a07a87c8f2f9)

#### `public List<RebarComplexGeometry> GetRebarComplexGeometries(bool withHooks, bool withoutClashes, bool lengthAdjustments, Reinforcement.RebarGeometrySimplificationTypeEnum simplified)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarComplexGeometry). These objects contain physical curves in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. RebarComplexGeometry only differs from RebarGeometry by containing a polycurve (of Arc and LineSegment objects) rather than a polyline. The polycurve only contains arcs if the "simplified" parameter is RATIONALIZED or FABRICATION. If "simplified" is NONE, any arcs will be returned as a series of line segments.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `withoutClashes` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether self-clash avoidance should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `lengthAdjustments` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether rounding and step tapering should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `simplified` (Tekla.Structures.Model.Reinforcement.RebarGeometrySimplificationTypeEnum) — A parameter to determine whether the "simplified" rebar shape recognition geometry should be returned.

**Returns:** `List<RebarComplexGeometry>` — A list of RebarComplexGeometrys.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/84a3a38b-d7eb-97df-7fba-a34d13de6610)

#### `public ArrayList GetRebarGeometries(bool withHooks)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarGeometry). These objects contain physical points in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `ArrayList` — An array list that contains the RebarGeometry objects.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/75649a4c-6252-09a1-b509-cd815e718c0f)

#### `public ArrayList GetRebarGeometries(Reinforcement.RebarGeometryOptionEnum options)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarGeometry). These objects contain physical points in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar.

**Parameters:**
- `options` (Tekla.Structures.Model.Reinforcement.RebarGeometryOptionEnum) — The options.

**Returns:** `ArrayList` — An array list that contains the RebarGeometry objects.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/bc45309d-fc4b-9bf9-c640-e71bb1ade771)

#### `public ArrayList GetRebarGeometriesWithoutClashes(bool withHooks)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarGeometry). These objects contain physical points in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. In case rebar polygon clashes with itself, physical points are moved to avoid clashing.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `ArrayList` — An array list that contains the RebarGeometry objects.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/470acf1f-1beb-f30a-a1c2-2fcab066ab4a)

#### `public RebarGeometry GetSingleRebar(int index, bool withHooks)`

Returns a single rebar inside the rebar group located by the given index. The indexing starts from the start point. The rebar represents a physical reinforcing bar and contains physical points in the 3D space of the bar. The method returns null on error, for example if given an erroneous index. The number of rebars in the group can be requested with GetNumberOfRebars().

**Parameters:**
- `index` (System.Int32) — The index of the rebar in the group.
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `RebarGeometry` — The instance of a RebarGeometry object that contains the point list of the single physical reinforcing bar. Null if the given index was not valid.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/41181569-65f8-f4ba-7722-3cd890c7a3d4)

#### `public RebarGeometry GetSingleRebarWithoutClash(int index, bool withHooks)`

Returns a single rebar inside the rebar group located by the given index. The indexing starts from the start point. The rebar represents a physical reinforcing bar and contains physical, non-clashing points in the 3D space of the bar. The method returns null on error, for example if given an erroneous index. The number of rebars in the group can be requested with GetNumberOfRebars().

**Parameters:**
- `index` (System.Int32) — The index of the rebar in the group.
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `RebarGeometry` — The instance of a RebarGeometry object that contains the point list of the single physical reinforcing bar. Null if the given index was not valid.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/8fd2e21a-3d2f-6211-92ba-9d6e652ac100)

### Properties
- `CatalogName` (String, get/set) — The name of the rebar mesh catalog.
- `Class` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the class of the reinforcement. The class is used to group reinforcements.
- `CrossBarLocation` (RebarMesh.RebarMeshCrossBarLocationEnum, get/set) — Defines the location of the crossing bars.
- `CrossDistances` (ArrayList, get/set) — The crossing spacing double value(s).
- `CrossSize` (String, get/set) — The size of the crossing rebar.
- `CutByFatherPartCuts` (Boolean, get/set) — Defines whether the rebar mesh is cut by father part cuts or not.
- `EndFromPlaneOffset` (Double, get/set) — The end offset value from the part surface.
- `EndHook` (RebarHookData, get/set) — The hook at the end of the reinforcing.
- `EndPoint` (Point, get/set) — The end point of the direction in which the longitudinal bars are distributed.
- `EndPointOffsetType` (Reinforcement.RebarOffsetTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the type of the end point offset. The options are: OFFSET_TYPE_LEG_LENGTHOFFSET_TYPE_COVER_THICKNESS
- `EndPointOffsetValue` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the concrete cover thickness or leg length at the second end of the bar.
- `Father` (ModelObject, get/set) — Gets or sets the father object of the reinforcement; the model object instance to operate on.
- `FromPlaneOffset` (Double, get/set) — The offset value from the part surface applied in both sides.
- `Grade` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the steel grade of the reinforcing bar. The grade indicates the strength of the steel used in reinforcing bars. It can also indicate other factors, such as the weldability or surface deformations of the bar.
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `InputPointDeformingState` (DeformingType, get/set) — Gets or sets the reinforcement input point deforming state.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `LeftOverhangCross` (Double, get/set) — The overhang of the crossing part's left side.
- `LeftOverhangLongitudinal` (Double, get/set) — The overhang of the longitudinal bar's left side.
- `Length` (Double, get/set) — The length of the rectangle rebar mesh.
- `LongitudinalDistances` (ArrayList, get/set) — The longitudinal spacing double value(s).
- `LongitudinalSize` (String, get/set) — The size of the longitudinal rebar.
- `LongitudinalSpacingMethod` (RebarMesh.RebarMeshSpacingMethodEnum, get/set) — The type of spacing between rebar mesh bars. Used both for longitudinal and crossing bars. The options are (RebarMesh.RebarMeshSpacingMethodEnum.): SPACING_TYPE_SAME_DISTANCESPACING_TYPE_MULTIPLE_VARYING_DISTANCES
- `MeshType` (RebarMesh.RebarMeshTypeEnum, get/set) — The type of the reinforcement mesh. The options are: RECTANGULAR_MESHPOLYGON_MESHBENT_MESH
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the name of the reinforcement.
- `NumberingSeries` (NumberingSeries, get/set) — Gets or sets the numbering series of the reinforcement.
- `OnPlaneOffsets` (ArrayList, get/set) — Gets or sets the double offset value for each leg on the same plane as the bar.
- `Polygon` (Polygon, get/set) — The polygon of the mesh.
- `RadiusValues` (ArrayList, get/set) — Gets or sets the radius value(s) of the bends in the bar.
- `RightOverhangCross` (Double, get/set) — The right overhang of the crossing bar.
- `RightOverhangLongitudinal` (Double, get/set) — The right overhang of the longitudinal bar.
- `StartFromPlaneOffset` (Double, get/set) — The start offset value from the part surface.
- `StartHook` (RebarHookData, get/set) — The hook at the beginning of the reinforcing.
- `StartPoint` (Point, get/set) — The start point of the direction in which the longitudinal bars are distributed.
- `StartPointOffsetType` (Reinforcement.RebarOffsetTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the type of the start point offset is either OFFSET_TYPE_LEG_LENGTH or OFFSET_TYPE_COVER_THICKNESS.
- `StartPointOffsetValue` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the concrete cover thickness or leg length at the first end of the bar.
- `Width` (Double, get/set) — The width of the rectangle rebar mesh.

## RebarMesh.RebarMeshCrossBarLocationEnum (enum)

The ways to locate the crossing bars.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/4ae1fcc1-01e0-0245-8025-8cd06a8711c8)

### Values
- `LOCATION_TYPE_UNDEFINED` = `-1` — The undefined location type.
- `LOCATION_TYPE_ABOVE` = `0` — The location of the crossing bars is above the longitudinal bars.
- `LOCATION_TYPE_BELOW` = `1` — The location of the crossing bars is below the longitudinal bars.

## RebarMesh.RebarMeshSpacingMethodEnum (enum)

The ways to distribute the reinforcing bars with different spacings.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/202198a8-2a54-900b-26a8-3b25c55db19f)

### Values
- `SPACING_TYPE_UNDEFINED` = `0` — The undefined spacing type.
- `SPACING_TYPE_SAME_DISTANCE` = `1` — Distributes the bars using the same distance for all bars.
- `SPACING_TYPE_MULTIPLE_VARYING_DISTANCES` = `2` — Varying distribution of the bars.

## RebarMesh.RebarMeshTypeEnum (enum)

The different types of reinforcement meshes.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/a9f722d1-5248-ab18-8d02-39e78dee4e05)

### Values
- `UNKNOWN_MESH` = `0` — The type of the mesh is unknown.
- `RECTANGULAR_MESH` = `1` — The shape of the mesh is rectangular.
- `POLYGON_MESH` = `2` — The shape of the mesh is a polygon. Create rectangular meshes also as polygon meshes.
- `BENT_MESH` = `3` — The shape of the mesh is bent.

## RebarOffsets (class)

This class can be used to specify the offset and the shortenings to be applied at the start and end of the bars to satisfy concrete cover and layering needs. This is only applicable to frozen rebar sets and where the same values are to be applied to all of the bars, and all legs in each bar.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/535dc6ed-a94a-8b5e-149b-f531bc4ea683)

### Constructors
- `public RebarOffsets()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarOffsets class

### Properties
- `AtDepth` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the depth to offset each bar leg, not including bar radius.
- `End` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the distance from the end of the bar to the surface of the concrete.
- `Start` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the distance from the start of the bar to the surface of the concrete.

## RebarProperties (class)

The RebarProperties class defines the default properties of the reinforcing bars in a RebarSet.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/131721c2-c623-c3df-1f06-ff6a0ba3302a)

### Constructors
- `public RebarProperties()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarProperties class.

### Properties
- `BendingRadius` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the bending radius of the reinforcement.
- `Class` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the class of the reinforcement. The class is used to group reinforcements.
- `Grade` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the steel grade of the reinforcing bar. The grade indicates the strength of the steel used in reinforcing bars. It can also indicate other factors, such as the weldability or surface deformations of the bar.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the name of the reinforcement.
- `NumberingSeries` (NumberingSeries, get/set) — Gets or sets the numbering series of the reinforcement.
- `Size` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the size of the reinforcement.

## RebarPropertiesNullable (class)

The RebarPropertiesNullable class defines the properties of the reinforcing bars affected by a RebarPropertyModifier.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/c532391c-a2bf-3795-52e9-e6bbea31ad1c)

### Constructors
- `public RebarPropertiesNullable()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarPropertiesNullable class.

### Properties
- `BendingRadius` (Nullable<Double>, get/set) — Gets or sets the bending radius radius of the reinforcement.
- `Class` (Nullable<Int32>, get/set) — Gets or sets the class of the reinforcement. The class is used to group reinforcements.
- `Grade` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the steel grade of the reinforcing bar. The grade indicates the strength of the steel used in reinforcing bars. It can also indicate other factors, such as the weldability or surface deformations of the bar.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the name of the reinforcement.
- `NumberingSeries` (NumberingSeriesNullable, get/set) — Gets or sets the numbering series of the reinforcement.
- `Size` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the size of the reinforcement.

## RebarPropertyModifier (class)

The RebarPropertyModifier class represents a modifier that can modify the characteristics of RebarSet reinforcing bars that pass through it.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/fccc6e86-8989-4082-2190-75f4fd3b4552)

### Constructors
- `public RebarPropertyModifier()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarPropertyModifier class.

Compares Identifiers of model objects.

**Parameters:**
- `obj` (System.Object) — The model object to be used in comparison.

**Returns:** `Int32` — 0 if object Identifiers are the same, 1 if given object Identifier is bigger, -1 otherwise.

#### `public CoordinateSystem GetCoordinateSystem()`

### Properties
- `AffectsWholeBarPlane` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the modifier affects all bars in the plane or just those that it touches.
- `BarsAffected` (BaseRebarModifier.BarsAffectedEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the reinforcing bars affected.
- `Curve` (Contour, get/set) — Gets or sets the geometric Contour of the rebar modifier.
- `Father` (RebarSet, get/set) — Gets or sets the RebarSet to which the modifier belongs. Only reinforcing bars generated by this RebarSet can be modified by this rebar modifier.
- `FatherPart` (Part, get/set) — Gets or sets the father part for all bars touching the property modifier.
- `FirstAffectedBar` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the first affected bar. If set to zero, the first affected bar will be chosen automatically.
- `FollowEdges` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a flag that indicates whether the modifier should attempt to follow the leg face edges located between its end points.
- `GroupingType` (Nullable<RebarPropertyModifier.GroupingTypeEnum>, get/set) — Gets or sets the grouping type.
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `RebarProperties` (RebarPropertiesNullable, get/set) — Gets or sets the reinforcing bar properties.
- `SpacingOverride` (RebarSpacing, get/set) — Gets or sets the spacing override.

## RebarPropertyModifier.GroupingTypeEnum (enum)

The grouping type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/c78cea4b-aa31-e9b6-1295-e07dfa3f8679)

### Values
- `AUTOMATIC` = `0` — Automatic grouping.
- `MANUAL` = `1` — Manual grouping.
- `NO_GROUPING` = `2` — No grouping.

## RebarSet (class)

The RebarSet class represents a set of reinforcing bars.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/f17a0c5b-46ec-bb51-0f38-6971aef88a48)

### Constructors
- `public RebarSet()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarSet class.

### Methods
#### `public int CompareTo(Object obj)`

Compares Identifiers of model objects.

**Parameters:**
- `obj` (System.Object) — The model object to be used in comparison.

**Returns:** `Int32` — 0 if object Identifiers are the same, 1 if given object Identifier is bigger, -1 otherwise.

### Properties
- `BarOrientation` (LineSegment, get/set) — Gets or sets the bar orientation line. If this is non-null, then it is used to orient the bar planes such that the line is parallel to all the planes.
- `CloseShape` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether disconnected bar legs should be connected where possible to form a closed shape.
- `FatherPart` (Part, get/set) — Gets or sets the father part for the rebar set bars. If set, overrides the automatic bar parenting.
- `FrozenState` (RebarSet.FrozenStateEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the current frozen state of the object.
- `Guidelines` (List<RebarGuideline>, get/set) — Gets or sets the rebar set's guidelines.
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `LayerOrderNumber` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the layer order number. If set to 0 this means use the creation date/time of the rebar set object to determine the layering.
- `LegFaces` (List<RebarLegFace>, get/set) — Gets or sets the rebar set's leg faces.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `Offsets` (RebarOffsets, get) — Gets the offset values applied to the whole rebar set.
- `RebarProperties` (RebarProperties, get/set) — Gets or sets the reinforcing bar properties for the rebar set.

## RebarSet.FrozenStateEnum (enum)

Represents the frozen state of the rebar set.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/b9c760df-3f8e-e21b-1d7c-0870b82f6fe0)

### Values
- `NOT_FROZEN` = `0` — No leg faces or surface in the rebar set is frozen.
- `FULLY_FROZEN` = `1` — All of the leg faces and surfaces of the rebar set are frozen.
- `PARTIALLY_FROZEN` = `2` — Some, but not all of the leg faces and surfaces of the rebar set are frozen.

## RebarSetAddition (class)

The RebarSetAddition class can be used to add RebarLegFace objects to an existing RebarSet.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/87273ccd-8487-e959-e60e-db165b5a6b8f)

### Constructors
- `public RebarSetAddition()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarSetAddition class with empty attributes.

### Properties
- `Father` (RebarSet, get/set) — Gets or sets the RebarSet to which the rebar set addition applies.
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `LegFaces` (List<RebarLegFace>, get/set) — Gets or sets the rebar set addition's RebarLegFace objects.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.

## RebarSpacing (class)

The RebarSpacing class defines spacing properties for a RebarGuideline.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/05404a92-6125-9e64-38ac-784900b5a5da)

### Constructors
- `public RebarSpacing()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarSpacing class.

### Methods
#### `public RebarSpacing Clone()`

Makes a copy of this object.

**Returns:** `RebarSpacing` — a new RebarSpacing instance.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/c9fd9bc4-c7ec-bd90-7e3d-d7ce3564ffee)

#### `public static RebarSpacing Create(RebarSpacing.Offset startOffset, RebarSpacing.Offset endOffset, IEnumerable<RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Element> elements, out RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Validation validation)`

Creates an exact spacing if the given elements are valid.

**Parameters:**
- `startOffset` (Tekla.Structures.Model.RebarSpacing.Offset) — The start offset.
- `endOffset` (Tekla.Structures.Model.RebarSpacing.Offset) — The end offset.
- `elements` (System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Element>) — The elements.
- `validation` (Tekla.Structures.Model.RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Validation.) — Returns a value indicating the validity of the elements.

**Returns:** `RebarSpacing` — A RebarSpacing instance.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/5aad86a8-235d-3196-c3c3-a2b4726808d8)

#### `public static RebarSpacing Create(RebarSpacing.Offset startOffset, RebarSpacing.Offset endOffset, int number)`

Craetes a spacing defined by number of bars.

**Parameters:**
- `startOffset` (Tekla.Structures.Model.RebarSpacing.Offset) — The start offset.
- `endOffset` (Tekla.Structures.Model.RebarSpacing.Offset) — The end offset.
- `number` (System.Int32) — The number of bars.

**Returns:** `RebarSpacing` — A RebarSpacing instance.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/e25e1d85-f2fd-c378-2d88-d0593f44ef8b)

#### `public static RebarSpacing Create(RebarSpacing.SpacingType type, RebarSpacing.Offset startOffset, RebarSpacing.Offset endOffset, double distance)`

Create a spacing which is defined by a single distance.

**Parameters:**
- `type` (Tekla.Structures.Model.RebarSpacing.SpacingType) — The type of spacing.
- `startOffset` (Tekla.Structures.Model.RebarSpacing.Offset) — The start offset.
- `endOffset` (Tekla.Structures.Model.RebarSpacing.Offset) — The end offset.
- `distance` (System.Double) — The spacing distance.

**Returns:** `RebarSpacing` — A RebarSpacing instance if the given type and distance are valid.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/720eb400-0689-b240-5abe-1f6de1db595d)

#### `public static bool IsExactFlexibleType(RebarSpacing.SpacingType type)`

Gets whether the spacing is an exact type with flexible space(s).

**Parameters:**
- `type` (Tekla.Structures.Model.RebarSpacing.SpacingType) — The spacing type.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if it is an exact flexible type spacing.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/53f65e5e-ad47-7e3a-64fe-6f4654c435ee)

### Properties
- `EndOffset` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the proposed offset to the last reinforcing bar from the end of the RebarGuideline.
- `EndOffsetIsAutomatic` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the end offset is automatic. When automatic the proposed end offset is calculated to be the concrete cover thickness plus half the reinforcing bar diameter.
- `EndOffsetType` (RebarSpacing.OffsetEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the end offset is exact or minimum. If the end offset is minimum the spacing algorithm may determine a larger offset.
- `ExactElements` (List<RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Element>, get/set) — Gets or sets the exact elements of the spacing.
- `ExactSpace` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the exact space.
- `ExcludeType` (RebarSpacing.ExcludeTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the exclusion of first and last bars.
- `InheritFromPrimary` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the secondary guideline inherits all its spacing properties from the primary guideline. This property is not applicable to a primary guideline.
- `InheritOffsetsFromPrimary` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the secondary guideline inherits its start and end offsets from the primary guideline. This property is not applicable to a primary guideline.
- `NumberOfBars` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the number of bars in the spacing object.
- `StartOffset` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the proposed offset to the first reinforcing bar from the start of the RebarGuideline.
- `StartOffsetIsAutomatic` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the start offset is automatic. When automatic the proposed start offset is calculated to be the concrete cover thickness plus half the reinforcing bar diameter.
- `StartOffsetType` (RebarSpacing.OffsetEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the start offset is exact or minimum. If the start offset is minimum the spacing algorithm may determine a larger offset.
- `TargetSpace` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the target space.
- `Type` (RebarSpacing.SpacingType, get/set) — Gets or sets the type of spacing. Does not allow change to exact spacing or number bars spacing.
- `Zones` (List<RebarSpacingZone>, get/set) — Gets or sets the spacing zones.

## RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing (class)

This class defines objects used in the exact spacing type.

## RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Element (struct)

This structure is used to hold number and distance data.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/6d0a7d41-926b-8adb-0ff7-ca117e9be98d)

### Constructors
- `public Element(int number, double distance)` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Element struct.

### Properties
- `Distance` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the spacing distance in the element.
- `Number` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the number of spaces in the element.

## RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Validation (enum)

Defines values used in validation of exact spacing elements.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/da987189-57da-6c11-3fdb-a97d436b256f)

### Values
- `VALID` = `0` — The elements are valid.
- `EMPTY` = `1` — There are no elements.
- `ZERO_ELEMENTS` = `2` — Contains elements with zero number or distance.
- `NEGATIVE_ELEMENTS` = `3` — Contains elements with negative number or distance.

## RebarSpacing.ExcludeTypeEnum (enum)

The different ways to exclude reinforcing bars from the spacing.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/74ba9b18-0f68-86c7-f4dd-9342a89de5aa)

### Values
- `EXCLUDE_TYPE_NONE` = `1` — All the reinforcing bars are included.
- `EXCLUDE_TYPE_FIRST` = `2` — The first reinforcing bar is not to be created to the spacing.
- `EXCLUDE_TYPE_LAST` = `3` — The last reinforcing bar is not to be created to the spacing.
- `EXCLUDE_TYPE_BOTH` = `4` — The first and last reinforcing bars are not to be created to the spacing.

## RebarSpacing.Offset (struct)

Defines parameters associated with the start and end of the spacing.

## RebarSpacing.OffsetEnum (enum)

The offset distance type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/4adf4df1-e121-c217-8ab3-e463d84f7be9)

### Values
- `EXACT` = `0` — The offset distance is exact.
- `MINIMUM` = `1` — The offset distance is the minimum required.

## RebarSpacing.SpacingType (enum)

Defines the different spacing types.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/9caee5b6-a3fd-09dd-da56-10a049e1f45a)

### Values
- `UNDEFINED` = `0` — Undefined spacing.
- `EXACT_SPACINGS` = `1` — Explicitly defined exact spacings.
- `NUMBER_BARS` = `2` — Spacing by number of bars.
- `TARGET` = `3` — Spacing by target distance.
- `EXACT_FLEXIBLE_FIRST` = `4` — Exact spacing with flexible first space.
- `EXACT_FLEXIBLE_LAST` = `5` — Exact spacing with flexible last space.
- `EXACT_FLEXIBLE_FIRST_AND_LAST` = `6` — Exact spacing with flexible first and last space.
- `EXACT_FLEXIBLE_MIDDLE` = `7` — Exact spacing with flexible middle space.

## RebarSpacingZone (class)

The RebarSpacingZone class defines the properties of a single spacing zone. The spacing properties of number of spaces, spacing and length are proposed properties that the spacing algorithm uses as input when calculating the final reinforcing bars spacing. Depending on the RebarSpacingZone properties and any other rebar spacing zones defined on the associated RebarGuideline the spacing algorithm may determine a different final reinforcing bars spacing from the original proposed properties. However the RebarSpacingZone properties will always contain the original proposed values.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/cf189735-28cc-b497-1dac-feb92431104f)

### Constructors
- `public RebarSpacingZone()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarSpacingZone class.

### Properties
- `Length` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the proposed overall spacing zone length.
- `LengthType` (RebarSpacingZone.LengthEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the length is absolute or relative. If the length is relative the length property is treated as a proportion of the overall available spacing length (from the associated RebarGuideline). The available spacing length is the guideline length less the calculated start and end offsets and less any fixed length spacing zones. An example of how relative length values are handled: With two relative length zones with proposed length values of 10 and 20 respectively the final calculated lengths will normally be 'available spacing length'*10/(10+20) and 'available spacing length'*20/(10+20) though the spacing algorithm may determine a different result in some situations.
- `NumberOfSpaces` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the proposed number of spaces in the spacing zone.
- `NumberOfSpacesType` (RebarSpacingZone.SpacingEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the number of spaces is exact or target. If the number of spaces is target the spacing algorithm may determine a different number of spaces to use.
- `Spacing` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the proposed spacing (the space between each reinforcing bar centerline) in the spacing zone.
- `SpacingType` (RebarSpacingZone.SpacingEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets a value indicating whether the spacing is exact or target. If the spacing is target the spacing algorithm may determine a different spacing to use.

## RebarSpacingZone.LengthEnum (enum)

The length type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/223a779e-0ae1-dcad-ff8c-52bcd3fe46f3)

### Values
- `ABSOLUTE` = `0` — The length is an absolute value.
- `RELATIVE` = `1` — The length is a relative value.

## RebarSpacingZone.SpacingEnum (enum)

The spacing type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/bb47f856-0f41-2b58-5a0c-0d59c8c0c37a)

### Values
- `EXACT` = `0` — The spacing is exact.
- `TARGET` = `1` — The spacing is a target value.

### Properties
- `BarPositions` (RebarSplice.RebarSpliceBarPositionsEnum, get/set) — Value 0: Joined bars on top of each other in the case of the lap type splice. Value 1: Joined bars parallel to each other in the case of the lap type splice.
- `Clearance` (Double, get/set) — The clearance between joined bars in the case of the lap type splice.
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `LapLength` (Double, get/set) — The lap length of the lap type splice.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `Offset` (Double, get/set) — The distance from the end point of the first bar along the bar length.
- `RebarGroup1` (Reinforcement, get/set) — The first one of the joined reinforcements (picked first).
- `RebarGroup2` (Reinforcement, get/set) — The second one of the joined reinforcements (picked second).
- `Type` (RebarSplice.RebarSpliceTypeEnum, get/set) — The type of the splice (can be a lap, weld or muff splice).

## RebarSplice.RebarSpliceBarPositionsEnum (enum)

The bar group positions in the splice.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/cdbe3eee-707a-0ae2-9131-b8237bc02d51)

### Values
- `SPLICE_BAR_ON_TOP` = `0` — Joined bars on top of each other.
- `SPLICE_BAR_PARALLEL` = `1` — Joined bars parallel to each other.

## RebarSplice.RebarSpliceTypeEnum (enum)

The splice types.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/b63b4f78-1efe-c97c-e733-e7fee3435d99)

### Values
- `SPLICE_TYPE_LAP_RIGHT` = `0` — The first (left) bar extends over the second (right) bar.
- `SPLICE_TYPE_LAP_LEFT` = `1` — The second (right) bar extends over the first (left) bar.
- `SPLICE_TYPE_LAP_BOTH` = `2` — Both bars extend over each other.
- `SPLICE_TYPE_MUFF` = `3` — The bar ends are joined with a muff.
- `SPLICE_TYPE_WELD` = `4` — The bar ends are joined with a weld.

## RebarSplitter (class)

The RebarSplitter class represents a modifier that can split the RebarSet reinforcing bars that pass through it.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/e862d1ea-64b1-1fe4-26a2-a92aa34bbd83)

### Constructors
- `public RebarSplitter()` — Initializes a new instance of the RebarSplitter class.

- `obj` (System.Object) — The model object to be used in comparison.

### Properties
- `BarsAffected` (BaseRebarModifier.BarsAffectedEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the reinforcing bars affected.
- `Cranking` (RebarCranking, get/set) — Gets or sets the rebar cranking.
- `Curve` (Contour, get/set) — Gets or sets the geometric Contour of the rebar modifier.
- `Father` (RebarSet, get/set) — Gets or sets the RebarSet to which the modifier belongs. Only reinforcing bars generated by this RebarSet can be modified by this rebar modifier.
- `FirstAffectedBar` (Int32, get/set) — Gets or sets the first affected bar. If set to zero, the first affected bar will be chosen automatically.
- `FollowEdges` (Boolean, get/set) — Gets or sets a flag that indicates whether the modifier should attempt to follow the leg face edges located between its end points.
- `Identifier` (Identifier, get/set) — The identifier of the object.
- `IsUpToDate` (object, get) — Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.
- `Lapping` (RebarLapping, get/set) — Gets or sets the rebar lapping.
- `ModificationTime` (object, get) — Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
- `SplitOffset` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the offset of the split from the location of the rebar splitter.
- `SplitType` (RebarSplitter.SplitTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the split type.
- `StaggerOffset` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the additional offset (stagger) of the split location for every other split reinforcing bar.
- `StaggerType` (RebarSplitter.StaggerTypeEnum, get/set) — Gets or sets the stagger type.

## RebarSplitter.SplitTypeEnum (enum)

The split type.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/27e2d4a2-4414-58ac-6830-edf05f2ea5e7)

### Values
- `LAPPING` = `0` — Lapping.
- `CRANKING` = `1` — Cranking.

## RebarSplitter.StaggerTypeEnum (enum)

The side of the split that the additional offset (stagger) is located.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/2c5b0cea-b4cf-ce97-321f-28514bca0952)

### Values
- `NO_STAGGER` = `0` — No stagger.
- `STAGGER_LEFT` = `1` — Stagger left.
- `STAGGER_RIGHT` = `2` — Stagger right.
- `STAGGER_MIDDLE` = `3` — Stagger middle.

#### `public List<RebarComplexGeometry> GetRebarComplexGeometries(bool withHooks, bool withoutClashes, bool lengthAdjustments)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarComplexGeometry). These objects contain physical curves in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. RebarComplexGeometry only differs from RebarGeometry by containing a polycurve rather than a polyline.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `withoutClashes` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether self-clash avoidance should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `lengthAdjustments` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether rounding and step tapering should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `List<RebarComplexGeometry>` — A list of RebarComplexGeometrys.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/c796aafb-3520-fe06-12e3-a07a87c8f2f9)

#### `public List<RebarComplexGeometry> GetRebarComplexGeometries(bool withHooks, bool withoutClashes, bool lengthAdjustments, Reinforcement.RebarGeometrySimplificationTypeEnum simplified)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarComplexGeometry). These objects contain physical curves in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. RebarComplexGeometry only differs from RebarGeometry by containing a polycurve (of Arc and LineSegment objects) rather than a polyline. The polycurve only contains arcs if the "simplified" parameter is RATIONALIZED or FABRICATION. If "simplified" is NONE, any arcs will be returned as a series of line segments.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `withoutClashes` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether self-clash avoidance should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `lengthAdjustments` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether rounding and step tapering should be included in the rebar geometry or not.
- `simplified` (Tekla.Structures.Model.Reinforcement.RebarGeometrySimplificationTypeEnum) — A parameter to determine whether the "simplified" rebar shape recognition geometry should be returned.

**Returns:** `List<RebarComplexGeometry>` — A list of RebarComplexGeometrys.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/47/84a3a38b-d7eb-97df-7fba-a34d13de6610)

#### `public ArrayList GetRebarGeometries(bool withHooks)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarGeometry). These objects contain physical points in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `ArrayList` — An array list that contains the RebarGeometry objects.

#### `public ArrayList GetRebarGeometriesWithoutClashes(bool withHooks)`

Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarGeometry). These objects contain physical points in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. In case rebar polygon clashes with itself, physical points are moved to avoid clashing.

**Parameters:**
- `withHooks` (System.Boolean) — A parameter to determine whether the hook points should be included in the rebar geometry or not.

**Returns:** `ArrayList` — An array list that contains the RebarGeometry objects.
